description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the complete integrated pipeline with input validation, the ValidateInput Choice state, enhanced Lambda validation logic, and the full end-to-end flow (success and failure paths). Refine the Mermaid diagram to show all services, data flows, and the validation decision point.
steps:
In docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, update the 'Current Implementation Status' section to add:
  - Description of the ValidateInput Choice state (checks file extension for supported formats: .mp3, .wav, .ogg, .txt)
  - Updated SleepAudioProcessor Lambda description noting input validation (required fields, file extension, bucket name)
  - INPUT_BUCKET_NAME environment variable added to the Lambda
  - Updated state ordering to include ValidateInput between WriteInitialMetadata and ProcessAudio

Update the second Mermaid diagram (the implementation status one) to show the complete flow with the validation decision point:
  Input S3 Bucket -> EventBridge Rule -> Step Functions State Machine -> WriteInitialMetadata (DynamoDB) -> ValidateInput (Choice) -> [valid] ProcessAudio (Lambda) -> SynthesizeSpeech (Polly) -> UpdateStatusCompleted (DynamoDB) -> PublishSuccessNotification (SNS Completed). Show the invalid path: ValidateInput -> [invalid] UpdateStatusFailed (DynamoDB) -> PublishFailureNotification (SNS Failed).

Add or update a section titled 'End-to-End Flow' or 'Pipeline Flow' describing:
  a. Success path: S3 upload -> EventBridge -> Step Functions -> WriteInitialMetadata -> ValidateInput (passes) -> ProcessAudio (Lambda validates and enriches) -> SynthesizeSpeech (Polly) -> UpdateStatusCompleted -> PublishSuccessNotification
  b. Failure path (invalid input): S3 upload -> EventBridge -> Step Functions -> WriteInitialMetadata -> ValidateInput (fails) -> UpdateStatusFailed -> PublishFailureNotification
  c. Failure path (processing error): Any step after ValidateInput throws -> Catch handler -> UpdateStatusFailed -> PublishFailureNotification
  d. Validation points: Choice state (file extension), Lambda handler (required fields, extension, bucket name)
Update the State Machine Integration section under Metadata Layer to include the ValidateInput step in the correct position (between WriteInitialMetadata and ProcessAudio).
Commit all changes with a conventional commit message: 'feat: complete pipeline wiring with input validation and end-to-end flow'
Run final verification: NODE_OPTIONS="" dotnet test from src/ and NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth from repo root.
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram shows the complete pipeline including the ValidateInput Choice state.
ARCHITECTURE.md documents both success and failure paths through the pipeline.
ARCHITECTURE.md describes input validation logic (file extension check in Choice state, field validation in Lambda).
All tests still pass after documentation update.
A conventional commit is created on the feature branch with all changes.
findings: Documentation update only. All 44 tests pass and CDK synth succeeds. Added ValidateInput Choice state docs, updated Mermaid diagram with decision point, added Input Validation section with two-layer validation approach, updated State Machine Integration numbering, and documented all error paths.
